metadata.description: project-workflow v2 — spec-driven feature development blueprint for AI-assisted coding

plugins.name: project-workflow
plugins.description: Spec-driven feature development plugin (Claude Code-native). 8 skills (/project-init, /project-personalize, /feature-init, /l1-review, /l2-review, /l3-review, /proof-bundle, /feature-done) + 4 sub-agents (agents-md-reviewer, spec-reviewer, tech-researcher, codebase-explorer).
